body:
Reported from an agentic session via natural language (no web UI available).

### Conversation

- **user:** In this formal-ai repository, solve the concrete CI regression in GitHub issue 730: Windows desktop attestations pass an LF checksum manifest to actions/attest v4, whose released parser splits on the host OS newline and fails by treating the whole file as one subject name. First inspect .github/workflows/desktop-release.yml and tests/unit/ci-cd/issue_717.rs. Then author a minimal failing regression test and change the workflow to attest the already-built artifact paths directly instead of parsing the portable checksum manifest. Preserve SHA256SUMS files for users, cover desktop and VS Code attestations, and run the focused test. Do not commit or push.

Filed automatically by Formal AI in agentic mode.

comments.body: Closing as an accidental duplicate created while executing #730 through the required Formal AI + Agent CLI self-hosting workflow. The coding request was incorrectly routed to the issue-filing capability instead of workspace tools; the captured session will be included in #730 as regression evidence.

title: Formal AI agentic session report
